title: рҹҰһ From Chat App to AI Powerhouse: Telegram + OpenClaw - Medium
content:
OpenClaw жҠҖжңҜе№Іиҙ§

In this guide, weвҖҷll walk through how to install OpenClaw on macOS and connect it to Telegram step by step. OpenClaw is a self-hosted AI assistant that runs locally on your machine while connecting to messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Before connecting OpenClaw to Telegram, we first need to install it locally. After entering your API key, OpenClaw verifies it and automatically configures a default model. ## Step 5: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. After configuring your model, OpenClaw will ask you to select a chat channel. After selecting **Telegram (Bot API)** as your channel, OpenClaw will prompt you to enter your Telegram bot token. After entering your Telegram bot token, OpenClaw finalizes the channel configuration. After completing the configuration, OpenClaw installs and starts the **Gateway service**. Installing Gateway service....Gateway service installed.Telegram: ok (@yourbotname)Agents: main (default)Heartbeat interval: 30mSession store: ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/sessions.json. Messages sent to your Telegram bot are routed through the OpenClaw Gateway, processed by your selected model, and returned in real time.

title: рҹҰһ OpenClaw: Your Step-by-Step Guide to Seamless Telegram Integration - Oreate AI
content:
OpenClaw жҠҖжңҜе№Іиҙ§

# Unlocking OpenClaw: Your Step-by-Step Guide to Seamless Telegram Integration. OpenClaw orchestrates everything, but the real 'thinking' and 'doing' comes from the AI models it connects to. If you've got a Mac mini, it's fantastic for keeping OpenClaw running 24/7 as a dedicated AI host. Next, you'll need an AI model. ### Getting OpenClaw Installed: The Technical Bits. Before we install OpenClaw itself, we need to set up its environment. The recommended path is Homebrew -> fnm -> Node.js -> OpenClaw. **Install Node.js**: OpenClaw officially recommends Node.js version 22. **Install OpenClaw**: The final installation step is simple: `npm i -g openclaw`. To connect OpenClaw with Telegram, you need a special token. **Verify the Connection**: Open Telegram, find your newly created bot, and send it a message like `/start` or 'Hello'. Go back to your Terminal and run: `openclaw pairing approve telegram PAIR-ABC123` (replace `PAIR-ABC123` with your actual code). You've successfully connected OpenClaw to Telegram. `openclaw pairing approve telegram PAIR-ABC123`. Open your Terminal and run `openclaw configure`.

title: рҹҰһ OpenClaw Cron Jobs: 8 Automation Templates, Schedules, and ...
content:
OpenClaw жҠҖжңҜе№Іиҙ§

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.

title: рҹҰһ OpenClaw: cron-scheduling - LobeHub
content:
OpenClaw жҠҖжңҜе№Іиҙ§

This Skill provides practical guidance to schedule and manage recurring and one-off tasks on Unix-like systems using cron and systemd timers. It explains cron syntax and common schedule patterns, crontab management commands (crontab -e, -l, -r, user crontabs), and shorthand strings like @daily and @reboot. Use it for automated backups, reports, cleanup, deployment hooks, cron-to-systemd migrations, and debugging why jobs didnвҖҷt run вҖ” improving reliability, observability, and maintainability of scheduled work. Covers cron syntax, crontab management, systemd timers, one-off scheduling, timezone handling, monitoring, and common failure patterns. `@reboot /path/to/script.sh # Run once at startup. 0 2 * * * /opt/scripts/backup.sh >> /var/log/backup.log 2>&1. ExecStart=/opt/scripts/backup.sh. # Set timezone for a specific cron job. ### Why didn't my cron job run? # cron-wrapper.sh вҖ” Run a command with logging, timing, and error alerting. # Usage: cron-wrapper.sh <job-name> <command> [args...]. Usage: cron-wrapper.sh <job-name> <command> [args...]}". LOG_DIR="/var/log/cron-jobs". 0 2 * * * /opt/scripts/cron-wrapper.sh daily-backup /opt/scripts/backup.sh. */5 * * * * /opt/scripts/cron-wrapper.sh health-check /opt/scripts/healthcheck.sh`.

Note: `openclaw cron run` now returns as soon as the manual run is queued for execution. Upgrade note: if you have older cron jobs from before the current delivery/store format, run `openclaw doctor --fix`. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --announce --channel telegram --to "123456789" openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --announce --channel  telegram --to  "123456789". openclaw cron edit <job-id> --no-deliver openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --no-deliver. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --light-context openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --light-context. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --announce --channel slack --to "channel:C1234567890" openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --announce --channel  slack --to "channel:C1234567890". openclaw cron add \ openclaw  cron  add  \ --name "Lightweight morning brief" \ --name  "Lightweight morning brief"  \ --cron "0 7 * * *" \ --cron "0 7 * * *"  \ --session isolated \ --session  isolated  \ --message "Summarize overnight updates." \ --message "Summarize overnight updates."  \ --light-context \ --light-context  \ --no-deliver --no-deliver.
